items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund (WH:SHF) scheme in England.

items.summary: UK local authority and regional estimates of greenhouse gas emissions.

items.summary: Final estimates of UK territorial greenhouse gas emissions.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: UK road transport fuel consumption at regional and local authority level, 2005 to 2024
items.summary: Consumption statistics for fuels used in road transport in the UK at regional and local levels from 2005 to 2024.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: spending over £25,000, April 2026
items.summary: Reports on departmental spending over £25,000.

items.summary: Household Energy Efficiency Statistics, headline release (June 2026).

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund statistics: June 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme statistics: May 2026
items.summary: Statistical release on Boiler Upgrade Scheme statistics for the estimation of capital grant uptake to support the installations of low carbon technologies in domestic and non-domestic buildings.

items.title: Official Statistics: Great British Insulation Scheme release: June 2026
items.summary: Statistical release on Great British Insulation Scheme (GBIS) statistics to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties in Great Britain.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: spending over £500, March 2026
items.summary: Spending by electronic purchasing card solution (ePCS), over £500.

items.title: Decision: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary: Details about a new steel trade measure from 1 July 2026, which will limit tariff-free steel import quota volumes.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/14: announcing the Dual-Use OGEL
items.summary: The Dual-Use Open General Export Licence (OGEL) covers an extensive list of dual-use items for a wider list of destinations, including South Korea, Chile, Singapore and Uruguay.

items.title: Guidance: Open general export licence (export of dual-use items)
items.summary: Licence permitting a wide range of dual-use listed items to a variety of destinations, including EU member states, the United States, and others.

items.title: Guidance: Overseas business risk for Malaysia
items.summary: Information on key security and political risks which UK businesses may face when operating in Malaysia.

items.title: How to make a data protection complaint to the Department for Business and Trade
items.summary: We are committed to handling your personal data in a way that is fair, transparent and in accordance with the law. If you are dissatisfied with how we have handled your data, this process outlines how you can make a complaint.

items.title: Notice: Warm Homes Loan Scheme: apply to participate as a lender (Phase 1)
items.summary: The Warm Homes Loan Scheme (WHLS) will unlock private lending and investment at scale for home retrofit.

items.title: Government has secured £100 billion of clean energy investment
items.summary: Energy Secretary announces that government has secured £100 billion of private clean energy investment.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 29 June 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Wales’s foreign investment win boosts economy and jobs market
items.summary: Statistics released today (23 June) show that Wales continues to successfully attract foreign investors.

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Horizon financial redress and legal costs data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.title: More oil and gas workers to be supported into jobs
items.summary: More oil and gas workers across Scotland will be offered tailored skills support to seize high-quality jobs in energy and other growth sectors.

items.title: Decision: Gangmasters Licensing Appeals results and judgements
items.summary: Appeal results and judgements from the Gangmasters Licensing Appeals.

items.title: Guidance: Guidance on the scope of FWA gangmasters licensing standard 7.1
items.summary: Further explanation about licensing standard 7.1, which covers work finding services that licence holders cannot charge a worker for.

items.title: Policy paper: Carbon budget and growth delivery plan
items.summary: The Carbon Budget and Growth Delivery Plan sets out how the government meets its statutory carbon budgets and secure the benefits of this transition for people and businesses.

items.title: Guidance: UK net zero transition: investment opportunities
items.summary: This investor prospectus outlines where and how investors can support the UK’s net zero transition.

items.title: Guidance: Carbon budget and growth delivery plan: Heat and buildings factsheet
items.summary: The Carbon budget and growth delivery plan (CBGDP) investor factsheet sets out the opportunities for the heat and buildings sector as the UK transitions to clean energy.

items.title: Guidance: Making a complaint to the Fair Work Agency about your recruitment agency
items.summary: This guidance is provided to help agency workers who have raised or need to raise a complaint to FWA about their recruitment agency.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Make Work Pay: draft code of practice on electronic and workplace balloting for statutory union ballots
items.summary: We are consulting on a draft code of practice on electronic and workplace balloting for statutory trade union ballots.

items.title: Make Work Pay: protection from detriments for taking industrial action
items.summary: We are seeking views on the types of detriments that employers should be prohibited from imposing on workers for taking industrial action.

items.title: Policy paper: Global Clean Power Alliance: finance mission update (June 2026)
items.summary: This update sets out progress under the Global Clean Power Alliance (GCPA) finance mission at London Climate Action Week 2026.

items.title: Policy paper: Global Clean Power Alliance: finance mission country action plans
items.summary: Country action plans launched with the Global Clean Power Alliance (GCPA) finance mission.

items.title: Large Load Controllers: Tier 1 Cyber Assessment Framework and associated guidance
items.summary: We're seeking views on a proposed Cyber Assessment Framework (CAF) profile for large electricity load controllers.

items.title: Research: National Survey of Businesses
items.summary: A quarterly, cross-cutting survey of UK businesses perceptions and challenges to inform the Department for Business and Trade (DBT)'s strategic objectives.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with G to I)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with G, H or I.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with S)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with S.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with A or B)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with A or B.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with C to F)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with C, D, E or F.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.
